name: souroldgeezer-design
description: Reference-driven design for sustainable software design, modern web UIs, serverless HTTP APIs, and ArchiMate® architecture models - build, extract, review, and look up code/module design (Lean waste discipline, information hiding, semantic coherence, coupling control, evolutionary design, .NET™ extension), responsive interfaces (W3C® WCAG™ 2.2 AA conformance, i18n, Core Web Vitals), serverless APIs (security, contract discipline, reliability, observability) across Azure® Functions™ on .NET™, Azure® Cosmos DB™, and Azure® Blob Storage™, and ArchiMate® 3.2 enterprise / solution architecture (serialised as OEF XML per The Open Group ArchiMate® Model Exchange File Format 3.2, loadable in ArchiMate®-conformant tools, with layered extract from .NET™ solutions, Bicep™ files, host.json, staticwebapp.config.json, and GitHub Actions™ workflows), with composable per-stack extensions, canonical-path drift detection across sibling skills, security-aware Bicep™ RBAC lifting, deployment-topology extraction, forward-only seed views, trust-boundary grouping, an executable source-geometry layout gate, architecture-design professional-readiness review for OEF model/view quality (model-valid, diagram-readable, review-ready), matching Claude Code subagents, and Codex skill metadata.

interface.shortDescription: Reference-driven software, UI, API, and architecture design.
interface.longDescription: Build, extract, review, and look up sustainable software design, responsive UI, serverless API, and ArchiMate® architecture guidance with bundled references.
defaultPrompt: Review this module design for coupling and boundary risks.
Review this UI against the responsive design reference.
Design or review the API and architecture for this feature.
